title: Image Ultra Realistic Cinematic Frame
sourceTitle: Image Prompt Midjourney Ultra Realistic Cinematic Frame
prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic frame of a middle-aged woman sitting alone at a kitchen table late at night, hands wrapped around a coffee cup, eyes fixed
on nothing. Warm practical ceiling light overhead, quiet domestic environment, slight window reflection in the background, grounded realism, muted warm
desaturated tones, shallow depth of field, intimate handheld documentary feeling --ar 16:9
